description:
src/lib.rs:263, :371 'self.access_token.as_str()'. Zeroizing<String> derefs to String which derefs to &str via Deref. reqwest's bearer_auth signature is 'fn bearer_auth<T: Display>(self, token: T) -> RequestBuilder', so passing &Zeroizing<String> would format via String's Display impl (same wire result).

Two camps:
  - .as_str() is explicit, readable, makes the type chain obvious. Defensible.
  - .as_str() is redundant noise; deref coercion handles it. Defensible.

Reasonable people disagree; flagging as opinion-tier per /review-rusty's confidence-calibration rule. No engineering basis to prefer one over the other.

Marking with --add-label opinion.
title: bearer_auth with .as_str() is redundant; Zeroizing<String> derefs
